subcodes.first_line: O Friend of the Kingdom! Since we separated from each other, and you departed for Europe and America, I keep you in continual remembrance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست ملکوتی از آن دم که فراق حاصل و توجه باوروپ و امریکا نمودی هر دم یاد
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
